chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3929 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.16106/2025 (Urgency). 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 6. 3. For orders on CMA No.16107/2025 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 07.08.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Counsel for the petitioner seeks time for preparation. Time is allowed. Adjourned to 21.08.2025. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
